---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

# Introduction

## About the Data

text

# Set up

```{r setup}
library(readr)
library(here)
```

## Read in data

```{r}
bg_chem <- read_csv(here::here("data/BGchem2008data.csv"))
```

# Analysis
```{r}
#| eval: false
#| echo: false
colnames(bg_chem)
str(bg_chem)
head(bg_chem)
summary(bg_chem)
```

```{r}
nitrate <- mean(bg_chem$NO3)
nitrite <- mean(bg_chem$NO2)
amm     <- mean(bg_chem$NH4)
phos    <- mean(bg_chem$P)
ratio <- (nitrate + nitrite + amm) / phos
plot(bg_chem$P, bg_chem$NO2 + bg_chem$NO3 + bg_chem$NH4)
```
